posts.author: eitanal (Eitan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

Lately I notices you added to the Status column ability to “Disable” an option.
Its a good feature!! but I would like suggest converting it to “Read Only” option.
Meaning, disable it for the users BUT to allow changing it by Automation/API.
In that way we can present many statuses as informative, and allow the user to pick only few.
Thanks
Eitan
